title: HP LaserJet Enterprise MFP FutureSmart Stack BOF RCE (CVE-2021-39238)
product: HP LaserJet Enterprise MFP / PageWide Managed
author: André Henrique (@mrhenrike) | União Geek
description: Stack-based buffer overflow in HP LaserJet Enterprise MFP and PageWide Managed devices running FutureSmart firmware. An unauthenticated attacker can send a specially crafted HTTP request containing a malformed font in a submitted print document, triggering a stack overflow that allows arbitrary code execution with elevated privileges. The vulnerability is wormable — a compromised device can automatically propagate exploits to other vulnerable HP printers on the same network segment.
remediation: Update to FutureSmart FS3 >= 3.9.8, FS4 >= 4.11.2.1, FS5 >= 5.3
